title: Debug and fix critical image loading failure for all 120 gallery images

requirements.summary: Audit and verify that all 120 gallery image files exist as valid PNG assets in frontend/public/assets/generated directory with correct filenames
acceptanceCriteria: All 120 image files exist in frontend/public/assets/generated directory
All filenames match the expected pattern (residential-1.png to residential-40.png, commercial-1.png to commercial-40.png, before-after-1.png to before-after-40.png)
All image files are valid PNG format and can be opened
File sizes are reasonable (not 0 bytes or corrupted)

file_operations.description: Create placeholder file to ensure the generated directory exists and is tracked by version control. This file can be empty or contain a single newline.

requirements.summary: Fix Portfolio component image path construction to correctly reference all 120 gallery images using absolute path pattern '/assets/generated/{category}-{number}.png'
acceptanceCriteria: Image paths in Portfolio component use correct absolute path format starting with /assets/generated/
No relative path references (no ./ or ../ prefixes)
Category names match directory structure exactly (residential, commercial, before-after)
Number formatting is consistent (1-40, no zero-padding unless directory uses it)
All 120 images render correctly in the browser without 404 errors

file_operations.description: Fix the image path construction logic to use the correct absolute path pattern '/assets/generated/{category}-{number}.png' where category is 'residential', 'commercial', or 'before-after' and number ranges from 1 to 40. Ensure no relative path prefixes (./ or ../) are used. Update the projectCategories data structure to generate exactly 40 images per category with the correct path format. Verify that the category names in the path match the directory structure exactly (use 'before-after' not 'beforeAfter' in paths).

requirements.summary: Enhance error logging in Portfolio component to capture detailed debugging information for each failed image load including complete URL, HTTP status, network errors, and CORS headers
acceptanceCriteria: Console logs show the exact URL attempted for each failed image
Error messages include HTTP status codes (404, 403, 500, etc.)
Network errors are caught and logged with full error details
CORS-related errors are specifically identified and logged
Each failed image load includes the image index and category for easy tracking

file_operations.description: Add comprehensive error logging to image load handlers. On image error events, log the complete attempted URL, image category, image index, and error details. Implement a fetch-based pre-check that attempts to load each image URL and logs HTTP status codes, network errors, and CORS-related issues. Include detailed console.error statements with structured information (category, index, URL, error type, status code) to facilitate debugging. Ensure error messages are clear and actionable.

requirements.summary: Verify Vite configuration correctly serves static assets from frontend/public directory and that /assets/generated/ path is accessible without transformation during build
acceptanceCriteria: Static assets in frontend/public are served at root level (public/assets/generated becomes /assets/generated)
Build process does not rename, move, or hash files in the generated directory
Assets are accessible in both development and production builds
No build warnings or errors related to asset handling

file_operations.description: Review and verify the Vite configuration to ensure that files in frontend/public are served at the root level without transformation. Confirm that the publicDir option is set correctly (or uses the default 'public'). Ensure that assets in public/assets/generated are not being renamed, moved, or hash-suffixed during the build process. If necessary, add explicit configuration to preserve the /assets/generated/ path structure in both development and production builds. Add comments documenting the asset handling strategy.

requirements.summary: Regenerate any missing, corrupted, or improperly formatted gallery images ensuring all 120 images are valid PNG files with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing high-quality interior design photography
acceptanceCriteria: All 120 gallery images are regenerated if any are missing or corrupted
All images are valid PNG format with appropriate file headers
Images have minimum dimensions of 800x600 pixels
Images represent diverse interior design styles and spaces as specified in original requirements
File sizes are reasonable (typically 100KB-2MB per image)

file_operations.description: Create a utility script that audits all 120 gallery images in frontend/public/assets/generated directory. The script should check for file existence, validate PNG format, verify minimum dimensions (800x600), and report any missing or corrupted files. Export a function that returns a detailed audit report including which images need regeneration. This utility can be run during development to identify problematic images. Include instructions in comments on how to trigger image regeneration for identified issues.

Ensure this image file exists as a valid PNG with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing a high-quality residential interior design space. If the file is missing or corrupted, it must be regenerated. The image should showcase luxury residential design work.

Ensure this image file exists as a valid PNG with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing a high-quality residential interior design space. If the file is missing or corrupted, it must be regenerated.

Ensure this image file exists as a valid PNG with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing a high-quality residential interior design space. If the file is missing or corrupted, it must be regenerated. This completes the residential category with 40 total images (residential-1.png through residential-40.png).

Ensure this image file exists as a valid PNG with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing a high-quality commercial interior design space. If the file is missing or corrupted, it must be regenerated. The image should showcase professional commercial design work.
Ensure this image file exists as a valid PNG with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing a high-quality commercial interior design space. If the file is missing or corrupted, it must be regenerated.

Ensure this image file exists as a valid PNG with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing a high-quality commercial interior design space. If the file is missing or corrupted, it must be regenerated. This completes the commercial category with 40 total images (commercial-1.png through commercial-40.png).

Ensure this image file exists as a valid PNG with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing a high-quality before-after transformation interior design space. If the file is missing or corrupted, it must be regenerated. The image should showcase dramatic design transformations.

Ensure this image file exists as a valid PNG with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing a high-quality before-after transformation interior design space. If the file is missing or corrupted, it must be regenerated.

Ensure this image file exists as a valid PNG with minimum 800x600 dimensions representing a high-quality before-after transformation interior design space. If the file is missing or corrupted, it must be regenerated. This completes the before-after category with 40 total images (before-after-1.png through before-after-40.png).
